user_query: Have I received any emails in the last 7 days? List sender and subject.

plan.query: Have I received any emails in the last 7 days? List sender and subject.
plan.reasoning: The query requires checking the user's email for any received emails in the last week. The graph agent is the appropriate choice since it has access to email data.

steps.task: Retrieve all emails received in the last 7 days and extract the sender and subject for each email.

plan.synthesis: Compile the list of senders and subjects from the retrieved emails.

invoked_agents.input: Retrieve all emails received in the last 7 days and extract the sender and subject for each email.
